Poster: At-Home Testing 
Dec. 22, 2025 
What to know 
Use this poster to share information about at-home testing for respiratory viruses. 
It could be helpful to post in healthcare clinics, health departments, or at community events. 
Format: PDF Dimensions: 8.5x11 in Page count: 1 Language: English (US) Size: 1,012 KB Length: Last updated: December 9, 2025
